task_completion.description: Verify that a new style named 'river_casing' was created in the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer web interface, the Styles list should show 'river_casing' associated with the 'ne' workspace.

task_completion.description: Verify that the SLD style contains the correct scale-dependent rules, colors, widths, and labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SLD editor should show rules with MinScaleDenominator/MaxScaleDenominator at 35000000. It should include a simple line (color #4292c6, width 1), a cased line (outer stroke #08306b width 4, inner stroke #deebf7 width 2), and a TextSymbolizer for the 'name' attribute (Arial, size 12, color #08306b) with VendorOption 'followLine'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'river_casing' is set as the default style for the 'ne:ne_rivers' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer Edit Layer page for 'ne_rivers', under the Publishing tab, 'river_casing' should be selected in the Default Style dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify that the output image was saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or file manager should show that the file 'rivers_regional.png' exists in the '/home/ga/output/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the generated image shows the cased line effect and labels in South America.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer displaying 'rivers_regional.png' should show rivers (in South America) rendered with a thick dark blue outline and a lighter blue inner core. Text labels (river names) should be visible and follow the curves of the rivers.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the GeoServer web interface to create and configure the style.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GeoServer web administration interface being used, rather than just API calls or direct file edits.

integrity.description: Verify that the image was generated via a genuine WMS GetMap request.
integrity.visual_evidence: A browser address bar or terminal command (e.g., curl/wget) should show a WMS GetMap URL containing the correct BBOX (-70,-35,-50,-15) and layer name (ne:ne_rivers).

integrity.description: Verify that the output image is not a manually created or downloaded mock.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image should clearly be the result of the GeoServer rendering engine applying the SLD style to the ne_rivers shapefile data, matching the requested styling parameters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The style must be named 'river_casing' in the 'ne' workspace. Scale threshold is 35,000,000. Global scale (>35M) uses #4292c6 (width 1.0). Regional scale (<=35M) uses an outer casing of #08306b (width 4.0) and an inner core of #deebf7 (width 2.0). Labels at regional scale use the 'name' attribute, Arial 12, color #08306b. The output image must be saved to /home/ga/output/rivers_regional.png and show South America (BBOX=-70,-35,-50,-15).
